paths.dayjs: Use the formatters in `@/lib/datetime` for display. dayjs is only allowed in files on the migration allowlist (see overrides in biome.json).
paths.@/lib/dayjs: Use the formatters in `@/lib/datetime` for display. dayjs is only allowed in files on the migration allowlist (see overrides in biome.json).
paths.@rallly/database: Database access is confined to the DAL: only features/**/data.ts and features/**/mutations.ts may import @rallly/database. Existing violations are on the migration allowlist (see overrides in apps/web/biome.json).

@/lib/posthog.message: User-attributed analytics events must go through track() from @/lib/posthog so guest person-profile handling cannot be forgotten at capture sites. The raw client is reserved for non-capture APIs (feature flags, identity merge) in allowlisted files (see overrides in apps/web/biome.json).

patterns.message: Only files inside app/ may import from app/. Routes are thin adapters; shared code belongs in features/, components/, or lib/. Existing violations are on the migration allowlist (see overrides in apps/web/biome.json).
src/utils is dissolved. Generic helpers live in @/lib/utils, infrastructure in @/lib, domain code in the owning feature.

patterns.message: components/ is domain-agnostic UI and must not depend on features/. Move domain components into features/<domain>/components/. Existing violations are on the migration allowlist (see overrides in apps/web/biome.json).

patterns.message: lib/ is the bottom layer (app -> features -> components -> lib) and must not import from features/ or components/. If this code needs domain logic, it belongs in a feature. Existing violations are on the migration allowlist (see overrides in apps/web/biome.json).
Only files inside app/ may import from app/. Routes are thin adapters; shared code belongs in features/, components/, or lib/.

patterns.message: Session scoped DAL modules derive the actor from cookies and must not be used in API routes. Webhooks, cron and API key routes authenticate their own way and pass proven scope to parameterized reads.
